◎译　　名　执政官：万圣节召唤

◎年　　代　2020

◎简　　介  

　　Four college students take possession of a 15th-century Celtic artefact and resurrect Archaon, legendary Lord of End Times, and the champion of the four gods of chaos. Haunting those who dare to summon the evil spirit by putting on the mask, one by one they are tormented in the realm of in-between…
